response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong large-scale infrastructure and distributed systems experience (Dunnhumby, Kubernetes, AWS CDK), critical gaps disqualify him. He has only ~3-4 years of C++ from 2014-2015, far below the required 8 years, with no recent C++ work; his past decade focuses on TypeScript, Node.js, and D. Technical leadership experience exists through staff roles and mentoring (workshops, Code Kata sessions) but lacks formal infrastructure team leadership. The role demands deep C++ expertise for compute platforms; substantial ramp-up would be required.
strengths: Proven large-scale distributed systems expertise at Dunnhumby (microservices handling millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong software architecture and design skills across multiple staff roles and open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Active mentoring and community engagement through workshops, technical talks, and organized Code Kata sessions
concerns: Only ~3-4 years of C++ experience from 2014-2015; significantly below 8-year minimum requirement with no recent C++ work
Current expertise skews TypeScript/Node.js with no demonstrated C++ contributions since early 2010s
Limited evidence of formal technical leadership within infrastructure or cloud compute teams; mentoring experience is informal/community-based
